questionHtml: Explain in terms of their metallic bonding why aluminium, Al and not calcium, Ca, can be used to make tent frames.
markschemeHtml:
metallic bonding in Al is stronger ✓


charge on cation /Al3+ is higher
OR
more valence electrons «than in Ca» ✓


ionic radius of Al3+ is smaller ✓

meta.title: Explain in terms of their metallic bonding why aluminium, Al and not calcium, Ca, can be used to make tent frames.
